steps.title: Restate the claim
steps.content: The authors assert all people naturally have an emotional attachment to where they live. The right quote must speak to home and its universal emotional power.

steps.title: Match the quotation
steps.content:
Choice A: "Home is home, to the lowly as well as the great; and no rank, or color destroys its sacred character, its power over the mind, and the affections." That nails universal attachment to home.

B is about Blue Beard; C warns against deceptive fame; D is about restorative sleep — none address home or attachment.

That matches choice A — A is correct.
